hero.headline: *Same-day repairs* — dishwasher to double oven
hero.subheadline: When your appliances quit, Sergiy shows up with the parts and know-how to get them running.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every major appliance brand
services_section.subheading: Refrigerators, washers, dishwashers, ovens — we diagnose fast and fix it right

services.title: Refrigerator & Freezer Repair
services.description: Not cooling right? Making weird noises? We'll find what's broken and get your food cold again.

services.title: Washer & Dryer Service
services.description: Won't spin, won't drain, won't start? We handle every washer and dryer problem.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Not cleaning dishes or won't drain? Quick diagnosis and same-day fixes.

services.title: Oven & Range Repair
services.description: Gas or electric, single or double wall ovens. We fix heating issues and faulty controls.

about.heading: One tech, one truck, honest work
about.body: Canton appliance repair with straight answers and fair pricing. We show up when we say we will.

reviews.name: Shawn C.
reviews.text: Sergiy repaired my washer twice and my double wall oven — same day service both times. Man of few words but knows his stuff!

reviews.name: Todd B.
reviews.text: Fixed my dishwasher in under 30 minutes, came same day I called, charged about a third of what I expected. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Anna Y.
reviews.text: Same-day fridge repair. Professional, showed me the problem, gave cost upfront before any work. Definitely calling again.

cta.heading: Appliance acting up? Let's fix it today
cta.body: Call now for same-day diagnosis and repair. Fair pricing, no surprises — just working appliances.
